1.description: Deductible amount — may be misapplied or already satisfied

2.description: Coinsurance amount — verify calculation against contract

3.description: Co-payment amount — verify against plan terms

4.description: Procedure code inconsistent with modifier — resubmit with correct modifier

5.description: Procedure code inconsistent with place of service — verify and correct

16.description: Claim lacks information or has billing errors — correct and resubmit

18.description: Exact duplicate claim — non-appealable unless original was denied

22.description: May be covered by another payer — coordination of benefits issue

23.description: Prior payer adjudication impact — review COB

24.description: Covered under capitation agreement — typically non-appealable

26.description: Expenses incurred prior to coverage — non-appealable

27.description: Expenses incurred after coverage terminated — non-appealable

29.description: Time limit for filing expired — appeal if proof of timely submission exists

39.description: Services denied at authorization — appeal with clinical documentation

45.description: Charge exceeds fee schedule/maximum allowable — verify contract rate

49.description: Non-covered routine/preventive exam — may be covered under preventive benefit

50.description: Not deemed medically necessary — appeal with clinical documentation

51.description: Pre-existing condition — may be appealable under ACA

58.description: Inappropriate place of service — verify and correct

59.description: Multiple/concurrent procedure rules — may need modifier

96.description: Non-covered charges — review remark codes for specific reason

97.description: Benefit included in another service — may need modifier 59/XE

107.description: Related/qualifying claim not identified — resubmit with reference

109.description: Not covered by this payer — send to correct payer

146.description: Invalid diagnosis for dates of service — verify and correct

167.description: Diagnosis not covered — appeal with medical necessity documentation

170.description: Denied for provider type — verify credentialing and enrollment

197.description: Missing precertification/authorization — obtain retroactive auth if possible

204.description: Not covered under current benefit plan — verify member benefits

242.description: Not provided by network provider — appeal if emergency or no network provider available

253.description: Sequestration — mandated federal spending reduction, non-appealable
